title: Audition Day

jokes.text: call it the hornberger system
jokes.setup: Pete mentions they hate manipulating auditionees with decoys
jokes.punchline: Liz casually names their manipulative process after Pete
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Liz's casual bureaucratic naming of their unethical process. Economy is flawless, very quotable.

jokes.text: Elizabeth lemon, I am represented by suzanne's b-plus talent
jokes.setup: Auditionee introducing themselves professionally
jokes.punchline: Their talent agency is literally called 'B-Plus Talent'
jokes.explanation: Solid joke about the sad reality of low-tier talent representation. Good specificity.

jokes.text: At your age, it's probably the last time you'll ever make a man happy
jokes.setup: Pete consoling Liz about making Jayden's dreams come true
jokes.punchline: Brutal age/sexual joke delivered as comfort
jokes.explanation: Excellently structured dark humor - starts sympathetic, ends brutal. Perfect Pete character integration.

jokes.text: that's true, liz is old
jokes.setup: Pete's brutal age joke about Liz
jokes.punchline: Deadpan agreement from bystander
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective pile-on joke. The matter-of-fact delivery sells it.

jokes.text: tgs is a small pyramid, which nevertheless will one day be your tomb
jokes.setup: Jack explaining Liz's position of power
jokes.punchline: Bizarre pyramid metaphor that becomes literal death prediction
jokes.explanation: Peak Jack - grandiose corporate metaphor that spirals into morbid absurdity. Highly quotable and rewatchable.

jokes.text: It's as useless as the winter olympics. This february on nbc.
jokes.setup: Jack dismissing human empathy
jokes.punchline: Accidentally plugs NBC's Olympics coverage mid-rant
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke - Jack's corporate programming overrides his emotional moment. Perfect 30 Rock self-aware humor.

jokes.text: Like katrina. do you remember katrina? That crazy girl from hair and make-up?
jokes.setup: Jenna predicting disaster 'like Katrina'
jokes.punchline: Reveals she means a coworker, not Hurricane Katrina
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jenna self-absorption - makes everything about her world. Excellent misdirection structure.

jokes.text: And i will get onstage and people will laugh even when i forget my, um, my--line. lines.
jokes.setup: Tracy claiming nothing will change with new cast member
jokes.punchline: Forgets the word 'lines' while claiming he remembers lines
jokes.explanation: Perfectly executed irony - Tracy demonstrates his exact problem while denying it. Great character integration.

jokes.text: i was trigorin in the seagull On the wesleyan artspace mainstage
jokes.setup: Tracy mocking Dotcom's acting experience
jokes.punchline: Dotcom's overly specific, pretentious theater credit
jokes.explanation: Good character reveal - Dotcom's unexpected theatrical background with perfect specificity.

jokes.text: miss lemon did say, 'keep this away from jenna.' But she may have meant the jenna that works downstairs at that luggage store
jokes.setup: Kenneth has clear instructions about Jenna
jokes.punchline: Kenneth's willful literal interpretation to help
jokes.explanation: Classic Kenneth - uses technicality to justify helping while maintaining innocence.

jokes.text: Ozark kisses? the woodsman's companion?
jokes.setup: Kenneth diagnosing Jack's bedbugs
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous regional euphemisms for bedbugs
jokes.explanation: Wonderfully absurd Kenneth-isms. 'Ozark kisses' is brilliantly ridiculous euphemism.

jokes.text: Back in stone mountain, even the mayor had bedbugs. And she was a horse.
jokes.setup: Kenneth explaining anyone can get bedbugs
jokes.punchline: Casual revelation that their mayor was literally a horse
jokes.explanation: Peak absurdist humor - the casual delivery of impossible information. Perfectly Kenneth. Instant classic.

jokes.text: Mr. donaghy's got blue ridge quilt ticklers. Oh, sorry. bedbugs
jokes.setup: Kenneth talking to Breckman about Jack's condition
jokes.punchline: Another folksy euphemism followed by translation
jokes.explanation: Good callback to Kenneth's euphemisms, maintains character voice

jokes.text: The great uta hagen once said... is why i'd like to audition for tgs
jokes.setup: Dotcom beginning with prestigious acting quote
jokes.punchline: Transitions directly into mundane audition request
jokes.explanation: Clever structural joke - builds up pretentious opening then deflates it. Good Dotcom characterization.

jokes.text: Walter, you idiot. you lost a card.
jokes.setup: Dotcom's failed attempt at smooth audition request
jokes.punchline: He breaks character to scold his preparation
jokes.explanation: Shows Dotcom's over-preparation and perfectionism. Decent character moment.

jokes.text: i thank you for treating my requests with respect
jokes.setup: Liz rejecting Dotcom's audition request
jokes.punchline: Dotcom's formal gratitude for being shot down
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dotcom formality - treats rejection like diplomatic negotiation.

jokes.text: congratulations on your nomination. For worst supporting bra!
jokes.setup: Flashback to Jayden and Jenna's past friendship
jokes.punchline: Jayden's cruel award show joke about Jenna
jokes.explanation: Good character backstory joke - shows Jayden's cruelty through fake award category.

jokes.text: hey, mom, it's walter. I'm just calling to tell you they cancelled the audition, so maybe pray on something else
jokes.setup: Desperate auditionee calling his mother
jokes.punchline: Asks mom to redirect her prayers since he's lying about cancellation
jokes.explanation: Sad-funny moment showing the desperation of auditionees. Prayer redirect is a nice touch.

jokes.text: Cisco, the human network
jokes.setup: Jack praising video conference equipment
jokes.punchline: Delivers corporate slogan mid-conversation
jokes.explanation: Classic Jack corporate speak. Less surprising than the Olympics callback but still effective.

jokes.text: I can hear your hair growing on this thing
jokes.setup: Jack complaining about video conference quality
jokes.punchline: Absurdly specific complaint about hearing hair growth
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist escalation of Jack's frustration with technology.

jokes.text: You know my fontanelle never closed
jokes.setup: Pete questioning Liz's intelligence
jokes.punchline: Liz's medical excuse for being manipulable
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific medical excuse. Perfect Liz self-deprecation with medical terminology twist.

jokes.text: Did you just use cisco's cutting edge Suremute technology to mute me?
jokes.setup: Jack being muted during conference
jokes.punchline: Even while angry, delivers product placement speak
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback - Jack's corporate conditioning so deep he advertises while being ignored

jokes.text: Like a neighborhood dad garage band
jokes.setup: Pete explaining why adding more auditionees makes system less effective
jokes.punchline: Specific analogy about diluted effectiveness
jokes.explanation: Solid observational analogy. Specific enough to be funny without being brilliant.

jokes.text: floodgate wheels are horizontal!
jokes.setup: Liz confused by Pete's floodgate metaphor
jokes.punchline: Pete's defensive explanation of floodgate mechanics
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation of Pete's metaphor confusion. His defensive expertise is in character.

jokes.text: Like a neighborhood dad garage band
jokes.setup: Pete explaining why adding people makes things less effective
jokes.punchline: Specific comparison to suburban dad musicians
jokes.explanation: Good specific analogy - perfectly captures suburban mediocrity through band reference

jokes.text: 'ey, fuhgeddaboutit
jokes.setup: Lutz introducing his alter ego
jokes.punchline: Stereotypical New Jersey character voice
jokes.explanation: Generic character voice joke. Predictable for Lutz but not particularly clever.

jokes.text: he's evil tracy? Oh, he's evil 'comma' tracy
jokes.setup: Jenna saying 'evil Tracy'
jokes.punchline: Tracy correcting punctuation interpretation
jokes.explanation: Clever grammatical joke that shows Tracy's unexpected attention to detail. Great economy.

jokes.text: i once saw that guy become trigorin At the wesleyan artspace.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Dotcom's threat as actor
jokes.punchline: Tracy's sudden respect for Dotcom's theater work
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Tracy actually listened and understands theater quality.

jokes.text: A taxicab!
jokes.setup: Jack being denied company car due to bedbugs
jokes.punchline: Kenneth's horror at suggesting taxi like it's degrading
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kenneth class consciousness - treats taxi suggestion as ultimate indignity.

jokes.text: You have mugabe's concubines. No, bedbugs!
jokes.setup: Kenneth seeing Jack scratching
jokes.punchline: Another bizarre regional euphemism, immediately corrected
jokes.explanation: Another great Kenneth-ism. 'Mugabe's concubines' is wonderfully absurd and specific.

jokes.text: I am an executive with the general electric corporation and i just need to get my medicine
jokes.setup: Jack having to take public transportation
jokes.punchline: His formal corporate introduction to subway passengers
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jack fish-out-of-water moment. His corporate credentials mean nothing on subway.

jokes.text: no, not since i was a child
jokes.setup: Liz asking Pete if he's happy
jokes.punchline: Pete's matter-of-fact admission of lifelong unhappiness
jokes.explanation: Perfectly dark Pete moment. The casual delivery of profound sadness is expertly done.

jokes.text: [growls] - no! bad! Sorry. it's a little crazy here today
jokes.setup: Someone at auditions making animal noises
jokes.punchline: Liz treating them like a misbehaving dog
jokes.explanation: Simple physical comedy that shows audition chaos

jokes.text: the australian jackie mason Was chemically castrated by his government
jokes.setup: Pete worrying about audition chaos
jokes.punchline: Casually horrifying detail about one auditionee
jokes.explanation: Wonderfully disturbing throwaway line. The casual delivery of dark information is peak 30 Rock.

jokes.text: my mom used to send me articles about How older virgins are considered good luck in mexico
jokes.setup: Bonding over interfering mothers
jokes.punchline: Jayden's oddly specific maternal concern
jokes.explanation: Decent cringe humor. The specificity helps but not particularly memorable.

jokes.text: i'm not gay. i'm bi-larious!
jokes.setup: Tracy calling for funny gay men
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'hilarious' and 'bi'
jokes.explanation: Standard pun. Functional but not inspired. Good economy though.

jokes.text: kolandra! kolandra!
jokes.setup: Tracy asking for funniest person
jokes.punchline: Crowd chanting unknown name enthusiastically
jokes.explanation: Decent absurdist moment. The name is funny enough but not exceptional.

jokes.text: it's a seagull
jokes.setup: Walter giving Dotcom good luck gift
jokes.punchline: References Dotcom's Chekhov play
jokes.explanation: Nice callback with perfect economy. Shows Walter paying attention.

jokes.text: i don't think you did, sir. I've just got the one pair, and i sleep in them
jokes.setup: Jack saying he walked in Kenneth's shoes
jokes.punchline: Kenneth's literal correction about his only shoes
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kenneth literal-mindedness reveals his poverty. Great character integration.

jokes.text: et tu, Kenneth?
jokes.setup: Kenneth avoiding Jack due to bedbugs
jokes.punchline: Jack's Shakespearean betrayal reference
jokes.explanation: Good Jack classical reference showing his dramatic self-pity.

jokes.text: and this is a reimbursement form for my gas. I drove a million miles
jokes.setup: Tracy presenting his recruited performers
jokes.punchline: Exaggerated mileage claim for performer recruitment
jokes.explanation: Tracy's excessive expense claim fits his obliviousness to money

jokes.text: was describing your sandwich necessary To our understanding of what happened?
jokes.setup: Liz finishing her story about calling references
jokes.punchline: Pete questioning irrelevant detail
jokes.explanation: Good meta moment - Pete calling out Liz's tendency toward unnecessary details

jokes.text: Scorsese: let me tell you one thing about jayden. I love jayden. Walken: i love jayden. Gottfried: i love jayden!
jokes.setup: Liz explaining Jayden's impressive references
jokes.punchline: All three celebrities giving identical endorsements
jokes.explanation: Decent impressions joke showing how generic positive references can be.

jokes.text: The hornberger system will de-vail. Is that the opposite of prevail?
jokes.setup: Jenna trying to sound dramatic
jokes.punchline: Immediately unsure about her made-up word
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jenna - attempts dramatic proclamation but immediately doubts her vocabulary

jokes.text: i'm gonna walk up to him And say the four most vicious words You can say to a person you've already met. 'nice to meet you.'
jokes.setup: Jenna planning psychological warfare
jokes.punchline: Revealing her 'vicious' plan is pretending not to remember someone
jokes.explanation: Exceptional Jenna moment - perfect structure building to anticlimactic but psychologically accurate 'vicious' plan

jokes.text: The hornberger system will de-vail. Is that the opposite of prevail?
jokes.setup: Tracy trying to sound threatening
jokes.punchline: Unsure about his made-up word
jokes.explanation: Good Tracy moment showing his confidence despite confusion. Nice callback usage.

jokes.text: nice to meet you
jokes.setup: Jenna's plan to psychologically destroy Jayden
jokes.punchline: The devastatingly simple execution
jokes.explanation: Brilliant psychological warfare joke. The setup makes this simple phrase devastating. Perfect economy and character work.

jokes.text: what are you, a robot?
jokes.setup: Liz following Jack's earlier robot advice
jokes.punchline: Jack now criticizing her for being robotic
jokes.explanation: Good ironic callback showing Jack's hypocritical management style.

jokes.text: I'll need an obama wig
jokes.setup: Anthony signing up to audition
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific prop request
jokes.explanation: Weak observational humor. The specificity helps slightly but not enough to make it memorable.

jokes.text: Frank rossitano. queens, new york. I guess dreams can come true
jokes.setup: Frank signing up to audition
jokes.punchline: Overly sentimental reaction to low-stakes opportunity
jokes.explanation: Good Frank moment - his cynical exterior cracks with unexpected hope

jokes.text: for my first character, i'd like to do an old janitor Who's finally had enough and stabs everybody!
jokes.setup: Auditionee introducing character idea
jokes.punchline: Cheerful description of mass violence
jokes.explanation: Decent dark humor. The enthusiasm for violence is appropriately disturbing.

jokes.text: how dare you pretend you don't remember me! I'm the one who doesn't remember you!
jokes.setup: Jayden's polite greeting after Jenna's psychological attack
jokes.punchline: Jenna's confused but determined response
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jenna logic - even when her plan works, she gets confused and competitive.

jokes.text: how dare you pretend you don't remember me! I'm the one who doesn't remember you!
jokes.setup: Jayden saying 'nice to meet you' to Jenna
jokes.punchline: Jenna's confused reaction revealing her own memory issues
jokes.explanation: Excellent payoff - Jenna's plan backfires when she can't remember if she knows him either

jokes.text: Oh, god, forgive me! I call this character smelly belly
jokes.setup: Josh describing his failed career and degrading web work
jokes.punchline: Sudden shift to childish character name
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing how far former TGS cast member has fallen.

jokes.text: hey, dotcom. nice to meet you
jokes.setup: Jenna's psychological attack being used by Jayden
jokes.punchline: Jayden deploying the same tactic on Dotcom
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Jayden learning and using Jenna's tactic. Strong structure.

jokes.text: have you ever wondered what happens In the refrigerator after the light goes off? Does the milk say, 'let's go down to the crisper drawer And make trouble'? I don't know. fuhgeddaboutit
jokes.setup: Lutz doing observational comedy
jokes.punchline: Weak premise ending with his Italian character voice
jokes.explanation: Weak comedy - generic observational material poorly executed, fits Lutz's incompetence

jokes.text: I don't know. fuhgeddaboutit
jokes.setup: Lutz performing his observational refrigerator material
jokes.punchline: Ends weak material with his character catchphrase
jokes.explanation: Shows Lutz falling back on gimmick when material fails. Accurately portrays bad comedy.

jokes.text: growing up in bed-stuy, there was a certain music To the way people talked. 'hey, papi Whatchoo doin'?' I'm sorry, can i start over? Someone really messed with my head right before i came on
jokes.setup: Dotcom trying to perform but losing confidence
jokes.punchline: His psychological state affected by Jayden's 'nice to meet you' tactic
jokes.explanation: Good callback payoff - shows how Jenna's tactic genuinely affected Dotcom's performance

jokes.text: My first piece will be a dinner party At martin scorsese's house with christopher walken And gilbert gottfried
jokes.setup: Jayden beginning his audition piece
jokes.punchline: Recreating the exact scenario from his references
jokes.explanation: Excellent setup - reveals Jayden was recording the reference calls for his audition material

jokes.text: [as christopher walken] thank you for inviting us, Martin. [as gilbert gottfried] i brought wine!
jokes.setup: Jayden doing dinner party scene with celebrities
jokes.punchline: Quality impressions delivered naturally
jokes.explanation: Solid impressions work that shows Jayden's actual talent.

jokes.text: give...it up. I figured out... your game
jokes.setup: Liz trying to confront Jayden
jokes.punchline: Terrible Walken impression while being serious
jokes.explanation: Funny character moment showing Liz's inability to do impressions even when angry.

jokes.text: your fingerprints are all over my camera
jokes.setup: Jayden revealing his manipulation plan
jokes.punchline: Implies Liz photographed his genitals
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation showing Jayden's true manipulative nature. Well structured reveal.

jokes.text: [maniacal laughter]
jokes.setup: Jayden asking if crazy person would laugh like this
jokes.punchline: Delivers completely unhinged laughter
jokes.explanation: Standard crazy laugh bit. Does the job but not particularly inspired.

jokes.text: It's just that you've never been right before. About anything
jokes.setup: Liz apologizing to Jenna for doubting her
jokes.punchline: Brutal addendum about Jenna's complete lack of judgment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Liz-Jenna dynamic. The escalation from apology to total destruction is expertly done.

jokes.text: A grotesque carnival of human misery
jokes.setup: Jack describing his first audition experience
jokes.punchline: Overly dramatic description of standard audition process
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jack - elevates mundane experience to operatic tragedy level

jokes.text: to be fair, i did not think kathy geiss Was gonna finish her song by taking off her underpants
jokes.setup: Acknowledging Jack's point about the audition being disturbing
jokes.punchline: Specific shocking detail about Kathy Geiss's performance
jokes.explanation: Excellent disturbing detail - perfectly captures the audition chaos with specific shocking image

jokes.text: They handed in a check request form For $600,000 worth of gas
jokes.setup: Jack talking about managing crazy actors
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous expense report from Tracy and Jenna
jokes.explanation: Good callback with absurd escalation. Shows the duo's complete disconnect from reality.

jokes.text: Care. love. live
jokes.setup: Jack explaining the robot's code
jokes.punchline: Unexpectedly humanistic robot programming
jokes.explanation: Beautiful absurdist moment - robot programmed with humanity. Perfect Jack philosophical nonsense.

jokes.text: Care. love. live
jokes.setup: Jack explaining the robot's code
jokes.punchline: Robot programmed with basic human emotions
jokes.explanation: Good irony - robot more human than the humans, perfect Jack reasoning

jokes.text: Boy, i hope he speaks english. Yikes
jokes.setup: Decision to hire the robot actor
jokes.punchline: Liz's dawning realization of practical problems
jokes.explanation: Good Liz reality check moment. Her practical concerns ground the absurd situation.

tmdb_overview: Liz and Pete try to rig the audition process; Tracy and Jenna decide they should conduct their own search for the next 'TGS' star.
insight: Seventy jokes in forty-three minutes—wordplay and character absurdism sustain mid-tier laughs.
